cognitive_synthesis.insights: System stability remains high, but hermes-gateway is currently offline. Disk utilization continues to climb (86%), approaching a critical threshold. Resource headroom is sufficient, but gateway restoration is required for full operational capacity.

[THE GUARD] successfully executed identity verification and updated security.lock. Telemetry scripts confirmed system activity and performed routine pruning of old audit logs. No critical failures or breaches detected.
